next_step.current_state: Both requested OCR/frontmatter migrations completed successfully. Per inbox workflow and v2 update, now delete processed inbox item.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request by running both specified finance documents through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to the invoice and bill while preserving their original note bodies, then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read required system workflows and schema before task work, applied finance schema exactly from visible note data, preserved note bodies, and removed inbox item after successful completion per inbox-processing update.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence in the inbox request file specified two target documents for OCR. The OCR and migration workflows require adding YAML frontmatter to existing notes using the finance schema while preserving body text. Both target files were updated accordingly, and the inbox file was deleted after completion as required by inbox lane rules.
